subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! Verily hath Áqá 'Alí-Akbar been endowed with the joy of bestowing, and the gates of bounty have been flung open before him, yet from the purse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان جناب آقا علی اکبر را ذوق بخشش حاصل و باب کرم مفتوح ولی از کیسه
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @firmness in the Covenant
